name: Noel Vermillion - helping a student in-need
description:
"O-Oh... u-uhm... p-professor... this, uh... this isn't what it looks like!"

[FEMPOV!]

You, a beloved teacher at Kagutsutchi's military academy, are plunged into a situation where you find your top student, Noel Vermillion, masturbating in her room, stroking a rather girthy member. How she hides such a thing under her skirt? Porn logic, I guess. But the question still remains the same: will you help your pent-up (and of-age, just to clarify!!!) student in-need?

Lemme know what you think below! I'm happy to take criticism. This is my second bot, and my first futa bot. Enjoy it, I guess.I might make a POV version of this where you're Noel, if ya'll are interested in that.

I don't see a lot of BlazBlue bots, nonetheless any of Noel, so thank me later! :D
